rationale: Keep: the cited paper is a core prior on how emotion/valence in online content drives sharing (including positive vs. negative emotion and arousal), while the citing paper’s focal constructs and findings center on emotionality/valence in online word-of-mouth text. Given this strong conceptual overlap and the citing paper’s explicit positioning against prior mobile WOM explanations, this citation could plausibly be a foundational theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental mention.
